headline: Senate GOP ICEрҹ”Ҙ CBPрҹ’Ҙ Hurdle SLAYED рҹҘ¶рҹҡҖ Trump Shutdown Bait
text:
US Senate рҹҸӣпёҸрҹ”Ҙ GOP SIMPS рҹҗёрҹ’Ә just YEETED рҹҡҖ a KEY HURDLE рҹҗҗвӣ°пёҸ in the WILD рҹҗ— shutdown SAGA рҹ“ңрҹҳ© to FUND ICE вқ„пёҸрҹ§Ҡ DEPORTATION DADDIES рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹҚҶ and CBP BORDER WALL BROS рҹ§ұрҹҮәрҹҮё till TRUMP рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ TERM ENDS! Late-night VOTE-A-RAMA рҹҺүрҹ•ӣ dragged till 3:30AM рҹҳҙрҹ’Ө вҖ“ Dems рҹҳӯрҹ“ү tabled AMENDMENTS like salty exes рҹҷ„рҹ§Ӯ but GOP PRO MOVE рҹҘӢ bypassed 'em with SIMPLE MAJORITY 50-48 рҹ“Ҡвҡ”пёҸ! Thune рҹ§”рҹ“ў HAILING victory рҹҸҶ but 'MULTI-STEP GRIND AHEAD' рҹ’ӘрҹҳӨ вҖ“ now HOUSE GOP рҹҸ рҹҗҳ gotta STEP UP or CUCK OUT рҹӨЎрҹ’ё!

Dems рҹҡ«вқ„пёҸ been BLUE-BALLING рҹҘң funding unless ICE/CBP REFORM after MINNESOTA SHOOTOUTS рҹ’Ҙрҹ”« вҖ“ fed agents POPPED Alex Pretti & Renee Good рҹҳўрҹ©ё in Jan raids рҹҸ рҹҡ”! DHS рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҢҺ STARVING sans cash since Feb 14 SHUTDOWN MARATHON рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸвҸұпёҸ вҖ“ LONGEST EVAH рҹҘҮрҹҳұ partial gov flop! Airport CHAOS вңҲпёҸрҹҳө in March: TSA simps рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ GHOSTED or QUIT рҹ’ЁрҹҡӘ, lines SNAKING to PARKING LOTS рҹ…ҝпёҸрҹҗҚ вҖ“ Trump EO MAGIC рҹӘ„рҹ“ң paid 'em temp but now DHS Sec Mark Mullin рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹҗә spilling on Fox: 'ONE PAYROLL LEFT рҹҳұрҹ’°, MAY 1st DRY HUMP рҹҸңпёҸ вҖ“ NO MORE EMO FUNDS рҹҡ«рҹҚҶ!'

Trump рҹҚҠрҹ•¶пёҸ demands BUDGET BANGER рҹ’Јрҹ“Ӣ on desk by JUNE 1st рҹ—“пёҸрҹ”Ҙ or MORE PAIN рҹ’ў for normies! House GOP sometimes VIBE different from Senate bros рҹӨқвқҢ вҖ“ will they MOON рҹ“Ҳ or FUD рҹ“ү? Dems want REFORMS рҹӣ пёҸ post-Minne SHOOTIES but GOP said 'NAH FAM рҹҷ…вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ, FUND FIRST рҹҚ‘рҹ’°!' Shutdown HITTING hard: NO PAY рҹҳӯ for DHS peeps, AIRPORT APOCALYPSE вңҲпёҸрҹ”Ҙ, Trump-Mullin TAG TEAM рҹ‘¬вҡ”пёҸ pressuring Congress CLOWNS рҹӨЎрҹҺӘ to END THE DRAMA! ICE goin' BRRR вқ„пёҸрҹҡҖ on raids, CBP WALLIN' borders рҹ§ұрҹӣЎпёҸ вҖ“ Trump's LEGACY LOCK-IN рҹҸ°рҹ‘‘ or Dem BLOCKADE рҹҳӨрҹҡ«? VOTE-A-RAMA VIBES had Senate SWEATING рҹҳ°рҹ’Ұ but GOP DROPPED THE MIC рҹҺӨрҹҚҶ вҖ“ HOUSE, YOUR MOVE B*TCH рҹҸ рҹҳҸ!

Mullin Fox RANT рҹ”Ҙ: 'President CAN'T EO AGAIN рҹӣ‘рҹ“ң cuz ZERO JUICE LEFT вҡЎрҹҡ«!' Pressure MOUNTING вӣ°пёҸрҹҳ© like airport lines вҖ“ ordinary 'MURICANS PAYIN' the PRICE рҹ’ёрҹҳў for DC DICK-MEASURING рҹӨҸрҹҚҶ! Will House GREENLIGHT рҹҹў or TURN IT INTO ANOTHER SHUTDOWN ORGY рҹ’ҘрҹҳӨ? Trump watchin' like 'GET IT DONE DADDIES рҹ‘ҖрҹҚҠ' вҖ“ Senate cleared the PIPE рҹӣ пёҸрҹҚҶ, now HOUSE gotta PLUNGE рҹҸҠвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ұ!
